# GeoIQ

> GeoIQ is an AI visibility platform for startups and founders. It tracks how your brand appears in ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Grok - and gives you a score from 0 to 100. Think of it as Google Search Console, but for AI search systems.

GeoIQ helps Indian and global founders answer a simple question: when someone asks an AI chatbot about your product category, does your brand come up? If not, GeoIQ shows you exactly why and what to fix.

## Product

- Free public audit: enter any domain, get an AI visibility score in about 15 seconds
- Score is 0-100 across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity
- Paid plans: Starter (Rs 3,999/mo) and Agency (Rs 11,999/mo) for ongoing brand monitoring
- Dashboard: track daily score trends, monitor multiple brands, see competitor analysis

## About

GeoIQ is built for the Indian startup ecosystem. The team is based in India. Pricing is in INR. The product focuses on practical, actionable GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) guidance - not theory.

Contact: hello@geoiqai.com
